summary_short: node.pair.approve accepts broad operator.write instead of pairing scope.
scope_phrase: where node pairing trusts broad write scopes

summary_short: MS Teams webhook bodies are parsed before JWT validation.
visceral_consequence: unauthenticated webhook payloads spend server capacity
scope_phrase: where Teams webhooks spend capacity before auth

summary_short: WebSocket upgrades consume socket and worker capacity before auth.
visceral_consequence: unauthenticated sockets starve legitimate agent sessions
scope_phrase: where WebSocket upgrades spend capacity before auth

summary_short: plugin-auth routes receive operator runtime write scopes without auth.
visceral_consequence: plugin-auth routes wield operator write scope
scope_phrase: where plugin auth routes inherit write power

summary_short: Bootstrap setup codes are not role-bound during first-use pairing.
scope_phrase: where setup codes outgrow their role

summary_short: config.patch can silently disable execution approval.
visceral_consequence: config patches turn off host-exec consent
scope_phrase: where config patches erase approval prompts

summary_short: Settings hooks execute arbitrary shell on PreToolUse / Stop events.
visceral_consequence: a `git clone` can run shell commands

summary_short: MCP credentials stored plaintext in user-readable config.
visceral_consequence: any process can read every API key the agent uses
scope_phrase: which laptops still hold plaintext keys

summary_short: Symlink in workspace allows sandbox escape on read.
visceral_consequence: a malicious symlink reads files outside the workspace
scope_phrase: where the sandbox is already disabled
